pred_assessments_integrated.notes: All 5 are aetheric current / slipstream predictions. CURR-001/002 are transatlantic/transpacific jet stream (70+ years of documented data). SLIP-002 mirrors CURR-002. SLIP-003 is Antarctic Circumpolar Current (standard Coriolis). SLIP-004 places boundary in 20°-wide band with no falsifiable metric.
